channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace
channel.dc:creator: Jonathan Lermitage

item.title: Kotlin Toolchain - Wed May 20 14:52:19 UTC 2026
item.description:
Provides support for Kotlin Toolchain, JetBrains' build tool for Kotlin and Java projects. The plugin helps you create and work with Kotlin projects in the IDE, run...
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 0 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: org.jetbrains.kotlin-toolchain
